ground_truth.findings: Heart size is normal. Cardiomediastinal silhouette stable. No pneumothorax, pleural effusion, or focal airspace disease. Nodular densities consistent with chronic granulomatous disease. Bony structures appear intact. Emphysema.
ground_truth.impression: Negative for acute cardiopulmonary disease. No pulmonary nodules identified.
